hero.title: Supporting Teaching, Connecting the World
hero.subtitle: Professional English teaching resources, workshops, and a collaboration platform for Keelung's teachers and foreign teachers

news.title: Latest News
news.subtitle: Stay updated with our latest news and events

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Committed to excellence in bilingual education
about.description: We are an experimental school dedicated to bilingual education, combining the best of Eastern and Western educational philosophies.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Failed to send. Please try again later.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: To become a leading school in bilingual education, nurturing students with a global perspective, local roots, and the capacity for lifelong learning as future citizens connected to the world.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Through an environment that values both Chinese and English equally, combined with character education and diverse learning, we inspire every student's potential and cultivate independent, innovative learners.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Focus
bilingual.desc: Parallel Chinese-English instruction builds fluent bilingual communication and cross-cultural understanding.

culture.title: Cultural Enrichment
culture.desc: Blending the best of Eastern and Western culture, giving students a broad, multicultural perspective.

innovation.title: Innovative Thinking
innovation.desc: Encouraging exploration and hands-on practice to build problem-solving and creative adaptability.

character.title: Character Education
character.desc: Emphasizing moral development and interpersonal skills to raise warm, responsible future citizens.

events.title: Founding
events.desc: The school was officially established, taking its first step in bilingual education and enrolling its first class.

events.title: Campus Expansion
events.desc: As enrollment grew, the campus was expanded with new specialized classrooms and activity spaces.

events.title: International Accreditation
events.desc: Received international education accreditation, with teaching quality recognized globally.

events.title: Digital Transformation
events.desc: Fully adopted digital teaching equipment, establishing smart classrooms and an online learning platform.

events.title: Sustainable Development
events.desc: Launched a green campus initiative, integrating sustainability into the curriculum.

items.name: Library
items.desc: A well-stocked bilingual library offering a comfortable space for reading and self-study.

items.name: Science Labs
items.desc: Fully equipped physics, chemistry, and biology labs that foster scientific inquiry.

items.name: Gymnasium
items.desc: A multi-purpose indoor gymnasium for ball sports, gymnastics, and large assemblies.

items.name: Art Studios
items.desc: Dedicated art and music classrooms where students can develop their creative talents.

items.name: Computer Lab
items.desc: Equipped with the latest computers for programming and information technology courses.

items.name: Outdoor Sports Field
items.desc: A spacious outdoor field for sports activities and extracurricular events.

intro.content: We warmly welcome every family to join our educational community as we support your child's growth together.

elementary.label: Elementary Division
items: Must be at least 6 years old by the required date
Kindergarten enrollment or graduation proof (if applicable)

junior.label: Junior High Division
items: Completion of elementary education or equivalent
Elementary school diploma or enrollment certificate

tuition.title: Tuition
tuition.note: The figures above are for reference only; actual amounts follow the current academic year's official announcement.

scholarship.title: Scholarships
scholarship.content: The school offers a range of scholarships, including academic excellence awards, talent awards, and need-based grants, to encourage and support students in pursuing excellence.

items.a: Admission periods vary each academic year. Please check the school website or contact the admissions office for the latest information.
The school offers bus service on multiple routes. Please contact the admissions office for route details and fees.

items.q: Can transfer students apply at any time?
items.a: Transfer applications depend on available spots per grade in a given year. We recommend contacting the admissions office early to confirm availability.

items.q: Are scholarships or tuition reductions available?
items.a: The school offers several scholarships and financial aid programs. Please see the Scholarships section or contact the admissions office for details.
